Slavery.title: Slavery
Slavery.description: Trafficking species is normal and not punishable by law. This has made the buying and selling of slaves a common sight in and around this faction's territories.

Cannibalism.title: Cannibalism
Cannibalism.description: Some might resort to cannibalism out of need and others out of want. This faction finds no issue with either and has even made it legal.

Commerce.title: Commerce
Commerce.description: A sophisticated trade system forms the backbone of this society, emphasizing fair trade, economic stability and mutual prosperity. All citizens are obligated to contribute to the economy by participating in trade.

Exploration.title: Exploration
Exploration.description: As a species driven by exploration, all individuals are legally required to serve aboard any dispatched exploration ships.

Expansionist.title: Expansionist
Expansionist.description: It is encouraged and legal to try and colonise other segments of the Slog. Members of {faction_name} also have a legal obligation to survey and document any planet that shows potential for terraforming.

Banditry.title: Bandits
Banditry.description: Banditry is encouraged within this faction and often includes crimes such as extortion, robbery and murder. Those engaging in these types of activities are often referred to as bandits.
